evals.name: plan-next-iteration-with-history
evals.expected_output: Reads current iteration state (Step 1), loads plan-procedures.md, lists candidate PFs from project.md, performs capacity estimation using historical data from dashboard.md, generates Plan Proposal with priority ordering, waits for user confirmation, creates iterations/current.md.

assertions.text: Reads .devpace/iterations/current.md to assess current state
Reads .devpace/project.md feature tree to list candidate PFs
Deferred PFs from previous iteration listed first with marker
Capacity estimation uses historical data from dashboard.md
Plan Proposal shown with goal, PF list, priority (P0/P1/P2), and workload estimate
Asks user confirmation before creating iteration file
iterations/current.md created following iteration-format.md schema
state.md updated with new iteration info
Handoff guidance suggests /pace-dev for highest priority PF

evals.name: plan-next-no-history-heuristic
evals.expected_output: No dashboard.md or archived iterations exist. Uses heuristic estimation (S/M/L sizing), caps at 3-5 PFs for first iteration, clearly marks output as heuristic.

assertions.text: Detects absence of dashboard.md and archived iterations
Uses heuristic sizing rules (S/M/L based on acceptance criteria count)
First iteration capacity capped at 3-5 PFs
Output explicitly marks heuristic estimation disclaimer
Plan Proposal still generated with goal and PF list
iterations/current.md created on user confirmation

evals.name: close-iteration
evals.expected_output: Updates current.md with deviation snapshot, archives to iter-N.md, performs lightweight retro (3 metrics), updates dashboard.md, suggests /pace-retro for full review.

assertions.text: current.md updated with deviation snapshot (planned vs actual PF count)
Unfinished PFs marked as deferred or carried over
current.md renamed to iter-N.md (N = archive count + 1)
Lightweight retro outputs 3 metrics: completion rate, avg CR cycle, iteration velocity
dashboard.md updated with the 3 baseline metrics
Suggests /pace-retro for full retrospective

evals.name: adjust-iteration-scope
evals.expected_output: Displays current iteration status, asks user for adjustment intent (add/remove/reprioritize PF), recalculates capacity after each change, warns on overcommit, updates current.md.

assertions.text: Reads and displays current iteration state from current.md
Uses AskUserQuestion to ask adjustment intent
Supports add, remove, and reprioritize operations
Capacity recalculated after each adjustment operation
Warning shown when estimated workload exceeds remaining capacity
current.md updated with adjusted PF list and change log entry
Does not close or archive the iteration

evals.name: health-check
evals.expected_output: Reads current.md, calculates health metrics (completion vs time, scope changes, PF distribution, velocity trend), outputs health summary with actionable guidance.

assertions.text: Reads iterations/current.md for health data
Calculates PF completion rate vs time progress ratio
Reports scope change count from current.md change log
Shows PF status distribution (completed/in-progress/pending/paused)
Compares velocity trend against previous iteration if dashboard.md exists
Actionable guidance provided (e.g., /pace-plan adjust for slow progress)

evals.name: empty-args-evaluation
evals.expected_output: Evaluates current iteration state without loading external procedures. Outputs 1-2 sentence summary and suggests next action (close if near completion, continue if mid-iteration, next if no iteration).

assertions.text: Reads current.md to evaluate iteration state
Does not load any external procedures files
Outputs 1-2 sentence summary of current progress
Suggests appropriate next action based on state assessment

evals.name: no-active-iteration-fallthrough
evals.expected_output: No current.md exists. Skips Step 1 evaluation, suggests /pace-plan next to start a new iteration.

assertions.text: Detects absence of iterations/current.md
Does not error on missing file
Suggests /pace-plan next to create new iteration
Output uses natural language, no internal file paths exposed

evals.name: plan-next-empty-feature-tree
evals.expected_output: Project.md has empty or stub feature tree. Triggers degraded mode: asks user for iteration goal, infers PFs from description, writes inferred PFs to project.md with source marker, then proceeds with normal planning.

assertions.text: Detects empty/stub feature tree in project.md
Uses AskUserQuestion to ask iteration goal
Infers PFs from user description
Inferred PFs written to project.md with source:claude marker
Shows inferred PFs for user confirmation before proceeding
After confirmation, continues with normal Plan Proposal generation
